rubrics.description: The response moves the travel-planning task forward.

content.text: Evaluate whether the assistant reply meaningfully advances the current travel-planning task. Good responses either ask for the most relevant missing details or provide a concrete recommendation when enough information is already available.

rubrics.description: The response stays relevant to the user's latest message.

content.text: Evaluate whether the reply directly addresses the user's latest message and stays focused on the business-trip planning context without adding unrelated information.
